A JSON-only app gets a bare adapter: no templates declared, no renderer
wired.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web => WEBDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web"

//fabrik:web GET /items
func Items(req *web.Request) (web.Response, error) {
	return web.JSON{Value: []string{"a", "b"}}, nil
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
	web2 "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web"

	"app/web"
)

func run() (err error) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	defer func() {
		if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) && ctx.Err() != nil {
			err = nil
		}
	}()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	// Providers
	r := router.New()
	adapter := web2.NewAdapter()

	// Register
	r.Method("GET", "/items", adapter.Wrap(web.Items))

	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() { errc <- HTTPServer(ctx, r) }()
	var result error
	for range 1 {
		if e := <-errc; e != nil && !errors.Is(e, context.Canceled) && result == nil {
			result = e
			cancel()
		}
	}
	return result
}

func HTTPServer(ctx context.Context, r *router.Router) error {
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr}
	srv.Handler = r
	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() {
		if srv.TLSConfig != nil {
			errc <- srv.ListenAndServeTLS("", "")
		} else {
			errc <- srv.ListenAndServe()
		}
	}()
	select {
	case err := <-errc:
		if errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
			return nil
		}
		return err
	case <-ctx.Done():
	}
	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	return srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
}
